title: Checkbox
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Checkbox primitive preserving controlled checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states, root and indicator data attributes, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, Space keyboard activation, and native checkbox form controls without internal state.

deviations.summary: Indeterminate state is represented through ARIA and data attributes rather than mutating the native input indeterminate property.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source is declarative and stateless. The rendered root exposes aria-checked="mixed" and data-indeterminate, which preserves the public accessible state without DOM mutation.
